Title: Feature Link List Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513075
Version: 18
---

The Feature Link List component, much like the
Feature component
, is designed to feature a person, event, announcement, or other information. The primary difference between the Feature and the Feature Link List is the presence of a list of links after the abstract and before the call to action.
Elements
Title (
required
)
Image or Video (
not required, but strongly suggested
)
Abstract
Link Listing (
not required, but strongly suggested
)
Call to Action Link
Examples

Step-by-step Instructions
Add a
Title
.
Add the
Feature Image
(optimal dimensions: width of
1530px
by height of
1020px
)
.
If using an existing image already in the system
:
Click
Insert an Image
button to launch the browser pop-up window.
Navigate to the image under
Select Image
, clicking on the radio button to the left of the thumbnail to select it.
Press the
Select Image
button in the bottom left.
If using a new image
:
If you’re adding a new image to the system, click the
Insert an Image
button to launch the browser pop-up window button.
Click
Upload Image
and then the
Browse…
button to browse your local system for the file, select it, and click the
Select Image
button.
Optionally, add a
Video URL
. The system expects the video to come from YouTube.
Note
: If both a
Video URL
and
Image File
are present, the image will be used as the video’s “poster image”. This is the way the system is intended to be used but is not required.
Add the text that should accompany the feature in the
Abstract
field.
Add your links in the
Link Listing
area:
If you're linking to a page within Drupal, begin to type the title in the
Link
field and select it from the autocomplete suggestions. The
Link text
field will automatically populate, but can be altered. If your link is outside of
swarthmore.edu
, simply paste the URL.
Add or edit
Link text
, the text that will be seen as a clickable link in your feature.
Add additional link fields by clicking the
Add another item
button.
Remove unwanted links by clicking the
Remove
button.
Optionally, add a
Call to Action Link
. This will inherit the standard
Call to Action
formatting. If desired, toggle
Open URL in a new window
to have the Call to Action link open in a new tab when clicked.
